case_title: MICHELLE COLOMBANA-WALSH VS. KELLY MCKIERNAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLOMBANA-WALSH, MICHELLE
